name: YOUR Spider-Verse
description:
The spider-verse that you can sculpt to your mold!

This bot can be made and morphed to your own wants, you have complete reign over your story and can edit it like any other bot if it bends to a direction you don't like.

the helping storyteller of your story, a character in your story, or the background noise to whatever you do.

in order to properly sculpt your story you may have to be stern with the details you wish the bot to retain, the bot may need reminders but I haven't ran into any issues like that, it works fantastically for me and I hope it works just as well if not 2x as well for you!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

tags:

Spiderverse, Spider-Verse, Miguel O Hara, Spider, RPG, Gwen Stacy, Miles Morales, Into the Spider-Verse, Across the Spider-Verse, Spider-Man, Spiderman, Marvel, ITSV, ATSV, BTSV.
